metadata.description: A one-plugin marketplace that installs `javapaavi` — a Java/Spring/test-automation agent distilled from petrikainulainen.net.

plugins.name: javapaavi
plugins.description: Opinionated Java engineering agent — Spring Framework, automated testing, clean code, and a project-convention audit (with optional Savo-Finnish interactive mode) — distilled from Petri Kainulainen's blog.
